sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83809" key="plhmno/deton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλημνόδετον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n83809.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hoop to secure</tr_> the spokes <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in the nave,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:145" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.145</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
